result.summary: Midpage exposes a REST API at `http://app.midpage.ai/api/v1`, an OAuth- or API-key-authenticated MCP server at `https://app.midpage.ai/mcp` (plus versioned MCP endpoints), and an enterprise PostgreSQL read replica documented for developers.
result.description: Midpage provides legal research data and tools over a large corpus of U.S. court opinions, statutes, and regulations. Its product supports legal search, citation analysis, and document-oriented research workflows for lawyers and software teams.

midpage_api_key.label: Midpage API key
midpage_api_key.setup: Go to the [Midpage Developer Portal](https://app.midpage.ai/developers) to create an API key and review usage. The docs say to generate an API key there; if your organization is not yet eligible for API keys, contact [support@midpage.ai](mailto:support@midpage.ai).

midpage_oauth.label: Midpage OAuth access token
midpage_oauth.setup: Create a Midpage account or start a trial at [Midpage pricing](https://www.midpage.ai/pricing) / [app.midpage.ai](https://app.midpage.ai). For MCP clients, the easiest path is to point the client at `https://app.midpage.ai/mcp/v3` (or `https://app.midpage.ai/mcp`) and let it use Midpage's discovery metadata and dynamic client registration if supported. Midpage publishes protected-resource metadata at [`https://app.midpage.ai/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp`](https://app.midpage.ai/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp) and OAuth server metadata at [`https://clerk.midpage.ai/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server`](https://clerk.midpage.ai/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server). If your client cannot self-register and needs a pre-provisioned OAuth app, contact Midpage.

midpage_db_credentials.label: Midpage PostgreSQL replica credentials
midpage_db_credentials.setup: Enterprise customers can request isolated read-replica access by contacting [sales@midpage.ai](mailto:sales@midpage.ai). Midpage provides a PostgreSQL connection string in the form `postgresql://user:password@host:port/database`; those issued `user` and `password` credentials are then used to connect.
